This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-w9hf-3pp7-pvxv. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.12 contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability in exported session HTML that preserves unsafe javascript: and data: links in generated content. Attackers can execute browser-side scripts if a trusted operator opens the exported file and activates a malicious link.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6xcg-6q43-rj2v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:13:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6xcg-6q43-rj2v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6xcg-6q43-rj2v"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:00Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:31:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-w9hf-3pp7-pvxv", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53841", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-cross-site-scripting-via-unsafe-markdown-links-in-exported-session-html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6xcg-6q43-rj2v"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Exported session HTML could keep unsafe markdown links", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:14:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6xcg-6q43-rj2v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.5.7"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:13:59Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Exported session HTML could keep unsafe markdown links
